---
title: "SAFE database screening for validation datasets"
author:
  name: Lai, Hao Ran
date: last-modified
format:
  html: default
comments:
  hypothesis: true
toc: true
code-fold: true
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries
library(here)
library(yaml)
library(DT)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| label: read-yaml
#| column: screen
# list all the dataset logs
logfiles <- list.files(
  here("data/derived/soil/validation/records"),
  pattern = "\\.yaml$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# read the logs and tidy up
records <-
  logfiles |>
  map(read_yaml) |>
  map(as.data.frame) |>
  list_rbind()

# tabulate the records
records |>
  select(
    DOI = doi,
    Title = metadata.title,
    Decision = decision,
    Reason = reason,
    Notes = notes,
    Year = metadata.year
  ) |>
  datatable(
    caption = "Screening decision of the SAFE database for soil and litter validation datasets."
  )
```
